cleanroom_implementation_rule: Always active in MSL type deduction
Enable generic lambdas (`auto` parameters) across all modern standards
Allow single-return `constexpr` functions in C++11 mode
Unlock loop control flow and local variable mutation inside `constexpr` starting in `metal2.0+`
Enable `template<typename T> constexpr T pi = ...` inside `metal2.0+`
Enable `0b` / `0B` literal prefix lexing starting in `metal2.0+`
Enable `if constexpr` (`CPlusPlus17` branch evaluation) uniformly across MSL standards for header metaprogramming
Enable `auto [x,y] = struct_var` unpacking across modern MSL standards
Enable variadic fold expressions across all modern MSL standards
Enable `inline constant T var = ...` definitions inside stdlib headers without ODR violations
Hard semantic error (`unknown type name 'concept'`); rejected in C++17-based `metal4.1` per specification §1.5
Hard semantic error when `virtual` keyword is encountered inside any class/struct (`Sema::CheckMSLClassDecl`)
Hard semantic error when `try`, `catch`, or `throw` token is encountered (`Sema::ActOnCXXTryBlock`)
Hard semantic error when `dynamic_cast` expression is parsed (`Sema::ActOnCXXTypeConstructExpr`)

metal1_x_behavior: 🚫 Rejected (`new / delete operators not permitted in Metal`)
